item.description:
Meeting Coach 0.5.4

  • Scope CI test gate to deterministic suites
  • Sustain browser meeting candidacy on mic, not frontmost
  • Fix CI test gate build: disable code signing like the release build
  • Require the full test gate on CI before every release
  • Split diarized utterances at speaker boundaries; Zoom-style export
  • Add agent onboarding: AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, project MCP config
  • Make the local AI engine self-heal when its process dies
